title: Balenced Knockback
description: a plugin that balances knockback to make the game more balanced for pvp.
body:
(⚠️WARNING THIS PLUGIN IS STILL IN ALPHA USE AT YOUR OWN RISK ⚠️)
a plugin that balances the knockback to make the game more balanced, lets say someone has 200 ping and takes no kb, this plugin will make both the players take the same amount of knockback, so they will both take no kb because the higher pinged player doesn't, this plugin should hopefully fix the Ping issue Minecraft pvp has, i will try to make a 1.8 version in the future, but for now we are focusing on this versions pvp.
